% check b.php
b.php:15:3: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)
b.php:17:10: class property `Foo\Service::userx` does not exist
b.php:18:16: class property `Another\Bar\User::namex` does not exist
b.php:28:3: $p is of type: Another\Bar\Group (DEBUG)
b.php:32:3: $u is of type: Another\Bar\User (DEBUG)
b.php:34:8: class `User` not found
b.php:36:13: cannot call method on 'string'

-- a.php --
<?php

namespace Another\Bar;

class User
{
	/** @var string */
	public $name;
}
-- b.php --
<?php

namespace Foo;

use Another\Bar;

class Service
{
	/** @var Bar\User */
	public $user;

	public function greet()
	{
		$name = $this->user->name;
		#debugType $name
		echo $name;
		$this->userx;
		$this->user->namex;
	}

	/** @var ?Bar\Group */
	protected $group;

	private function hi()
	{
		$this->group->name;
		$p = $this?->group->parent;
		#debugType $p
		$p->name;

		$u = new Bar\User;
		#debugType $u
		$u2 = new \User;
		$u2->foo;

		$p->name->noMethodsForString();
	}
}
-- c.php --
<?php

namespace Another\Bar;

/**
 * @property ?self $parent
 */
class Group
{
	/** @var string */
	public $name;
}
